user.title: Connect to Guesty
user.description: Enter your Guesty API credentials. You can find these in the Guesty Developer Dashboard.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Guesty
reauth_confirm.description: Your Guesty credentials need to be updated. Please enter your new client secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your client ID and secret.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Guesty API. Please check your network connection.
error.rate_limited: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again later.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Guesty account is already configured.

init.title: Filter by Tags
init.description: Optionally enter Guesty tags to narrow the listing selector. Leave empty to see all listings.

data_description.tag_filter: Enter one or more Guesty listing tags. Only listings with matching tags will appear in the selector.

select_listings.title: Select Listings
select_listings.description: Choose which Guesty listings to track in Home Assistant. At least one listing must be selected.

data_description.selected_listings: Select the Guesty listings you want to monitor. Deselected listings will have their devices and sensors removed.

intervals.title: Polling Configuration
intervals.description: Configure how often the integration polls the Guesty API.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the Guesty API for listing updates. Minimum 5 minutes.
data_description.reservation_scan_interval: How often to poll the Guesty API for reservation updates. Minimum 5 minutes.
data_description.past_days: Number of past days to include in reservation queries.
data_description.future_days: Number of future days to include in reservation queries.

error.invalid_scan_interval: Scan interval must be at least 5 minutes.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Guesty API. Please try again later.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please re-authenticate the integration.
error.rate_limited: Guesty API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
error.no_listings_selected: At least one listing must be selected.
error.no_listings_match_tags: No listings match the specified tags. Try different tags or clear the tag filter.

add_reservation_note.name: Add reservation note
add_reservation_note.description: Append a note to a Guesty reservation.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

set_listing_status.name: Set listing status
set_listing_status.description: Activate or deactivate a Guesty listing.

status.name: Status
status.description: The target status: active or inactive.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

create_task.name: Create task
create_task.description: Create an operational task for a listing.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

set_calendar_availability.name: Set calendar availability
set_calendar_availability.description: Block or unblock a date range on a listing calendar.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

update_reservation_custom_field.name: Update reservation custom field
update_reservation_custom_field.description: Update a custom field value on a reservation.

value.name: Value
value.description: The new value for the custom field.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

set_custom_field.name: Set custom field
set_custom_field.description: Set a custom field value on a Guesty listing or reservation.

target_type.name: Target type
target_type.description: Entity type to update (listing or reservation).

target_id.name: Target ID
target_id.description: The Guesty listing or reservation ID to update.

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to set. Type must match the field definition.

get_custom_fields.name: Get custom fields
get_custom_fields.description: Return all cached custom field definitions.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.

get_custom_field_values.name: Get custom field values
get_custom_field_values.description: Return current custom field values for a listing or reservation.

target_type.name: Target type
target_type.description: Entity type to read (listing or reservation).

target_id.name: Target ID
target_id.description: The Guesty listing or reservation ID to read.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific Guesty config entry.
